about.title: Our Story
about.hero_text: We're more than a food truck. We're an experience.

story.title: Cuban roots, modern flavor
story.p1: HOLALA Cuban Flavor was born from the dream of bringing authentic Cuban cuisine to the streets of San Antonio. Every dish tells a story of family, tradition and tropical flavor.
story.p2: We use fresh ingredients, inherited recipes and modern techniques to create a unique culinary experience — the street vibes of Havana with the Texan heart of San Antonio.
story.p3: We operate Wednesday through Sunday across San Antonio, bringing flavor to Stone Oak, Alamo Heights, Downtown, Southtown and surrounding areas.

items.title: Authenticity
items.desc: Family Cuban recipes we don't compromise for convenience.

items.title: Freshness
items.desc: Fresh ingredients, cooked to order, every day.

items.title: Community
items.desc: We're part of San Antonio, we care about every neighborhood we visit.

items.title: Quality
items.desc: Every dish should exceed your expectations — that's our promise.

location.title: Location & Hours
location.follow_ig: Follow us on Instagram for today's exact location

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about HOLALA Cuban Flavor

items.q: When and where can I find the food truck?
items.a: We operate Wednesday through Sunday from 4pm to 10pm around San Antonio. We rotate through Stone Oak, Alamo Heights, Downtown and other areas. For today's exact location, follow us on Instagram @holalacubanflavor.
Yes, we'll be enabling online ordering soon. For now you can order directly at the truck or contact us for catering events.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept cash, debit and credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), Apple Pay and Google Pay. We process payments through Square.
Yes, we have several vegetarian options like yuca with mojo sauce, moros y cristianos (rice & beans), and tostones. Check our menu for all options.
If you have food allergies, please let us know when ordering. Our staff is trained to help you. Dishes may contain gluten, dairy and tree nuts.

items.q: Do you do private event catering?
items.a: Absolutely! We offer catering for birthdays, weddings, corporate events, quinceañeras and more. Use our catering form or call us at 210 975 0176 for a quote.

items.q: How far in advance should I book catering?
items.a: We recommend reaching out at least 2 weeks ahead for small events and 4+ weeks for large events. For peak dates (year-end, summer), the earlier the better.

items.q: Do you have a fixed menu or does it rotate?
items.a: We have a core menu of Cuban classics available every day, plus daily specials that rotate by season. Follow us on social media to see the specials.
